title: Commerce and Government Preset Pack
description: Profiles and starter templates for ecommerce price monitoring and tender/government notice monitoring.

files.content: Commerce and Government preset pack installed. Use the project templates to create crawl-ready workspaces.

php bin/mnb-scraper template:create ecommerce-monitor --output-dir=projects/ecommerce --name=ecommerce
php bin/mnb-scraper template:create tender-monitor --output-dir=projects/tenders --name=tenders
